contract_scope: Fixed big-endian binary framing for server → client token streaming on the WS upgrade path introduced by #M-11. Header is 24 bytes, fixed layout, versioned; payload format depends on frame_type. Consumed by backend-king-php/support/token_frame.php (TokenFrame class) and by any WS client implementing the infer.token / infer.end / infer.error events.
honesty_rules: magic must be the 4-byte ASCII sequence 'KITF' (0x4B495446 as u32). A wrong magic MUST be rejected before any other validation; there is no recovery mode.
version is pinned at 1. The wire format is extended by bumping version and updating supported_versions; clients receiving an unknown version MUST reject the frame, never fall back to v1 parsing.
frame_type is enumerated (delta=0, end=1, error=2). Any other value is a decode failure, not a silent default.

token_count is a u16 and reflects how many tokens the server actually packed into this frame's payload. llama.cpp server-mode can batch; 1-frame-per-token is NOT claimed, and clients MUST NOT assume it.
sequence numbers monotonically increase within one request stream. The codec exposes assertMonotonicSequence() so tests and clients can refuse frames that arrive out of order.

reserved1 (offset 7) and reserved2 (offset 22) are zeroed on encode; a non-zero value on decode is rejected as a forward-compatibility trap — later versions that repurpose these bytes will bump version first.

payload_length is authoritative for the payload extent. If the received byte buffer length does not equal HEADER_SIZE + payload_length, the frame is rejected; no partial frame is ever exposed to the application layer.
max_payload_bytes=1048576 matches the king_http1 one-shot body cap so a client can always replay the final frame over a request/response boundary if the WS path fails over.

request_id_crc32 is a fast de-mux key, not an authentication token. Clients MAY drop frames whose crc32 does not match their active request; the authoritative request_id is carried in the envelope layer.

fields.name: request_id_crc32
fields.note: crc32 of ASCII request_id for fast de-mux

payload_layouts.delta: raw UTF-8 token bytes, length = payload_length
payload_layouts.end: JSON body, length = payload_length, schema: { tokens_in:int, tokens_out:int, ttft_ms:int, duration_ms:int }
payload_layouts.error: JSON body, length = payload_length, schema: { code:string, message:string }

sample_vectors.name: delta-hello
sample_vectors.description: Single delta carrying the UTF-8 token sequence 'hello' (token_count=2), flags = final_in_burst | utf8_boundary_safe.

sample_vectors.name: end-summary
sample_vectors.description: End frame closing the stream with generation telemetry.

sample_vectors.name: error-abort
sample_vectors.description: Error frame emitted when the worker drains mid-generation.
